untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental metrics (book-to-market ratio, price-to-book classification) which are not available in the technical indicator list. The allowed indicators are purely price-based, volume-based, and technical analysis derivatives. Book-to-market classification requires access to accounting data (book value) and market cap, neither of which are in the ALLOWED INDICATORS.
translation_notes: This is a classic Fama-French value factor strategy. While the conceptual logic (long value, short glamour with 1-year holding) is clear, it cannot be operationalized using only technical indicators. A proper implementation would require: (1) P/B or B/M ratio screening, (2) portfolio classification logic, (3) fundamental data access. Suggest implementing with fundamental data connectors or custom portfolio construction functions outside the technical indicator framework.
